content.problemStatement:
### **Aptitude Practice Question**

The project manager was anxious __ finish the report by the end of the day.
 A) to finishing
 B) on finishing
 C) to finish
 D) No improvement

---

### **Answer & Explanation**

"To finish" is correct as it shows the correct infinitive form after "anxious."Also Check:➣ Test your knowledge- Quiz!
